description_long: This is a modern, single-story house surrounded by a dense arc of mature trees, providing privacy and a natural barrier. The house features a flat roof and a clean, rectilinear layout with large glass windows and sliding doors, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions. The exterior is finished with a combination of white and dark gray panels, complemented by wooden accents that add warmth to the contemporary design. The property includes landscaped green spaces and patios, with visible outdoor seating and garden areas. The main entryway is understated, with a simple pathway leading to a recessed door, and the overall structure emphasizes open-plan living. The house is set within a manicured lawn, with the tree line forming a partial enclosure around the building.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and wood-accented white and gray exterior, surrounded by a dense arc of trees and landscaped gardens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, flat roof, and the arc of trees forming a partial enclosure behind the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive glass windows, outdoor patio, and the dense tree line wrapping around the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the house, large sliding doors, and the continuous tree barrier at the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible garden plots, outdoor seating, and the tree arc curving around the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a simple pathway, minimal overhang, and no prominent decorative elements
